fields.项目背景与目标：为什么要这么设计？:
viaim长期品牌公益行动，在Earth Month完成首次品牌化官宣发布。
建立viaim的品牌责任感和环保主义形象，让用户感知这不是一句环保口号，而是可持续执行的品牌动作。
fields.目标受众与投放渠道：设计给谁看？在哪里看？: 从单点合作延展成一整套品牌形象资产，包括品牌责任感、长期主义、国际化合作背书，以及未来节点性传播内容，主要面向viaim海外社媒及独立站平台。

fields.需求名称 - Requirement Description * 必填项: 版本更新通知邮件模版
fields.衡量成功的指标:
邮件打开率目标：≥ 30%
核心目标：用户读完后能清晰知道"更新了什么"并产生升级意愿
fields.项目背景与目标：为什么要这么设计？: 需要一套可复用的版本更新通知邮件模板。每次版本迭代时，运营人员可直接替换文案和配图，无需重新设计，保证品牌视觉一致性的同时降低每次发送的制作成本。
fields.目标受众与投放渠道：设计给谁看？在哪里看？: 用户画像为有一定科技产品使用经验的职场人群，阅读场景多为手机端邮件客户端（Gmail / Outlook）。设计需兼顾 PC 端与移动端的阅读体验，我会把图片转为html格式。
fields.备注 - Notice:
模板必须基于模块化结构设计，每个功能更新点为独立可复制的卡片模块，支持增减
所有文案区域需标注 [占位符]，明确哪里填标题、哪里填正文、哪里放图
禁止使用大面积背景图作为主视觉，邮件客户端图片加载失败时需保证信息可读性
风格要求：简单克制，非促销风，不用渐变堆叠或过度装饰

fields.需求名称 - Requirement Description * 必填项: 澳洲客户关于海外产品的物料需求
fields.衡量成功的指标:
输出一套可对外使用的高清产品素材包，并按产品分类整理，便于 VCG / Leader 直接下载和转发使用。
素材需覆盖客户明确要求的产品及类型，包括 NEXS G1、viaim Connect speakerphone、OpenNote、NoteKit、RecDot 的高清产品图、包装图、场景图。
成功标准：客户可直接用于澳洲渠道提报和销售团队推广，减少后续反复补素材的沟通成本。需要在6月24日下班前完成资料的反馈。
fields.项目背景与目标：为什么要这么设计？:
澳洲客户 VCG 正在协助 viaim 对接澳洲本地代理商 Leader，后续 Leader 的 55+ 销售团队会将 viaim 产品推广给澳洲 B2B、政府、企业、旅游、医院、学校及零售渠道客户。
目前客户缺少可统一下载和对外展示的高清产品素材，因此需要整理一套海外渠道产品素材包，方便客户完成渠道提报、销售介绍、客户演示及后续市场推广。
fields.目标受众与投放渠道：设计给谁看？在哪里看？:
目标受众：澳洲本地代理商 Leader 销售团队、VCG 团队，以及其后续对接的 B2B 客户、政府/企业客户、旅游渠道、医院、学校及零售商客户。
使用渠道：客户提案文件、销售介绍 PPT、邮件沟通、B2B 渠道推广、零售商提报资料、线下销售拜访材料及产品素材下载文件夹。

[https://www.figma.com/design/rbYzg50siPR64NRov9ZHbZ/2603---Pro-3%E3%80%81Air-2-%E6%96%B0%E5%93%81%E5%95%86%E8%AF%A6?node-id=3321-60086&t=3nU4d0oBPJf5mA54-11](https://www.figma.com/design/rbYzg50siPR64NRov9ZHbZ/2603---Pro-3%E3%80%81Air-2-%E6%96%B0%E5%93%81%E5%95%86%E8%AF%A6?node-id=3321-60086&t=3nU4d0oBPJf5mA54-11)

 ## Memory Foam Ear Tips

  ### New Material. Softer Fit. Better Seal.

  - Slow-Rebound Fit
  - Noise Isolation
  - Long-Wear Comfort
  - Breathable Design
  - Secure In-Ear Hold

  ———

  ## Slow-Rebound Memory Foam

  ### Shapes to Your Ear for a Better Fit

  Made with slow-rebound memory foam, the ear tips gently compress and gradually return to shape, adapting to the contours of your ear canal. The result is a more secure fit, improved passive noise isolation, and a lower chance of slipping out.

  ———

  ## Soft Surface Support

  ### Distributes Pressure for Lasting Comfort

  The soft foam fills small gaps inside the ear canal and spreads pressure more evenly, instead of creating a single pressure point. This helps reduce ear fatigue and keeps the fit comfortable, even during extended wear.

  ———

  ## Open-Cell Porous Structure

  ### Breathable Comfort Without Heat Buildup

  The internal open-cell structure helps create subtle airflow pathways, reducing the stuffy feeling that can come from a fully sealed fit. It keeps your ears feeling more comfortable over time.

  ———

  ## Multiple Sizes

  ### Find the Fit That Feels Right

  Available in two colors and three sizes: S / M / L, designed to fit different ear shapes.

  - S: 13 mm
  - M: 14 mm
  - L: 15 mm

  Colors: Black / White

  Measurements are for a single ear tip. Each package includes one pair of the same size.

  ———

  ## How to Use

  1. Align the base of the ear tip with the earbud nozzle, then press firmly until it locks into place.
  2. Gently pinch and roll the foam tip between your thumb and index finger, then insert the earbud into your ear.
  3. Wait a few seconds for the memory foam to expand and conform to your ear canal for a secure seal.

  ———

  ## What’s in the Box

  Memory Foam Ear Tips × 2

  Each package includes one left and one right ear tip in the same size.
  If you need different sizes, please purchase the corresponding size separately.

  ———

  ## Care Notes

  1. Do not expose the ear tips to high temperatures for extended periods, as this may affect the material and shape.
  2. Before wearing, make sure the silicone base and memory foam are securely attached to prevent the ear tip from coming loose.
  3. We recommend replacing memory foam ear tips about every 3 months, depending on your usage and wear conditions

[https://www.figma.com/design/rbYzg50siPR64NRov9ZHbZ/2603---Pro-3%E3%80%81Air-2-%E6%96%B0%E5%93%81%E5%95%86%E8%AF%A6?node-id=3321-60086&t=3nU4d0oBPJf5mA54-11](https://www.figma.com/design/rbYzg50siPR64NRov9ZHbZ/2603---Pro-3%E3%80%81Air-2-%E6%96%B0%E5%93%81%E5%95%86%E8%AF%A6?node-id=3321-60086&t=3nU4d0oBPJf5mA54-11)

 ## Memory Foam Ear Tips

  ### New Material. Softer Fit. Better Seal.

  - Slow-Rebound Fit
  - Noise Isolation
  - Long-Wear Comfort
  - Breathable Design
  - Secure In-Ear Hold

  ———

  ## Slow-Rebound Memory Foam

  ### Shapes to Your Ear for a Better Fit

  Made with slow-rebound memory foam, the ear tips gently compress and gradually return to shape, adapting to the contours of your ear canal. The result is a more secure fit, improved passive noise isolation, and a lower chance of slipping out.

  ———

  ## Soft Surface Support

  ### Distributes Pressure for Lasting Comfort

  The soft foam fills small gaps inside the ear canal and spreads pressure more evenly, instead of creating a single pressure point. This helps reduce ear fatigue and keeps the fit comfortable, even during extended wear.

  ———

  ## Open-Cell Porous Structure

  ### Breathable Comfort Without Heat Buildup

  The internal open-cell structure helps create subtle airflow pathways, reducing the stuffy feeling that can come from a fully sealed fit. It keeps your ears feeling more comfortable over time.

  ———

  ## Multiple Sizes

  ### Find the Fit That Feels Right

  Available in two colors and three sizes: S / M / L, designed to fit different ear shapes.

  - S: 13 mm
  - M: 14 mm
  - L: 15 mm

  Colors: Black / White

  Measurements are for a single ear tip. Each package includes one pair of the same size.

  ———

  ## How to Use

  1. Align the base of the ear tip with the earbud nozzle, then press firmly until it locks into place.
  2. Gently pinch and roll the foam tip between your thumb and index finger, then insert the earbud into your ear.
  3. Wait a few seconds for the memory foam to expand and conform to your ear canal for a secure seal.

  ———

  ## What’s in the Box

  Memory Foam Ear Tips × 2

  Each package includes one left and one right ear tip in the same size.
  If you need different sizes, please purchase the corresponding size separately.

  ———

  ## Care Notes

  1. Do not expose the ear tips to high temperatures for extended periods, as this may affect the material and shape.
  2. Before wearing, make sure the silicone base and memory foam are securely attached to prevent the ear tip from coming loose.
  3. We recommend replacing memory foam ear tips about every 3 months, depending on your usage and wear conditions
